description: cross_repo auto-promote report emitted with convention_ref = n6a-20260422-004 and priority_floor = 95
actual_cmd: bash -c '[ -f reports/n6_cross_repo_promotions.json ] && [ "$(jq -r .convention_ref reports/n6_cross_repo_promotions.json 2>/dev/null)" = "n6a-20260422-004" ] && [ "$(jq -r .priority_floor reports/n6_cross_repo_promotions.json 2>/dev/null)" = "95" ] && echo 1 || echo 0'
